en.title: Wire Epistola in through the APIs you already own.
en.description: Common Ground support ships out of the box today; other orchestrators are delivered via custom adapters while we expand the integration catalog.

cards.title: Common Ground ready
cards.body: Built-in alignment with Common Ground APIs keeps municipalities compliant without reinventing orchestration.

cards.title: Open REST API
cards.body: Every template, clause, and delivery endpoint is controllable via our documented REST interface, ready for any stack.

cards.title: Custom adapters
cards.body: We co-design integrations for the orchestrators on your roadmap—no prebuilt connectors yet, but expert services on call.

en.roadmapText: We're actively validating packaged connectors for leading municipal orchestrators. Until those land, teams can move forward using REST endpoints, event hooks, and service engagements tailored to their environment.

nl.title: Koppel Epistola via de API's die je al hebt.
nl.description: Common Ground support is out-of-the-box beschikbaar; andere orchestrators worden geleverd via custom adapters terwijl we de integratie catalogus uitbreiden.

cards.title: Common Ground ready
cards.body: Ingebouwde afstemming met Common Ground API's houdt gemeenten compliant zonder orkestratie opnieuw uit te vinden.

cards.title: Open REST API
cards.body: Elke template, clausule, en delivery endpoint is controleerbaar via onze gedocumenteerde REST interface, klaar voor elke stack.

cards.title: Custom adapters
cards.body: We ontwerpen integraties samen voor de orchestrators op je roadmap—nog geen prebuilt connectors, maar expert services beschikbaar.

nl.roadmapText: We valideren actief packaged connectors voor toonaangevende gemeentelijke orchestrators. Tot die tijd kunnen teams verder met REST endpoints, event hooks, en service engagements afgestemd op hun omgeving.
